title: schoenoplectus pungens subsp. longispicatus
intro: Schoenoplectus pungens subsp. longispicatus, also known as the sharp-flowered bulrush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sedge family that is native to the wetlands of North America. The sharp-flowered bulrush has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Schoenoplectus pungens subsp. longispicatus may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
